svg.title: Full production RAG pipeline — ingestion and retrieval explained
svg.desc: Two-phase diagram: ingestion phase (document to Qdrant) and retrieval phase (query to LLM answer), with each step labelled and explained.

g.text: Phase 1 — ingestion (runs once, or when new documents added)
Chunking — the most important ingestion step. This is what makes RAG accurate or inaccurate.
Stores full context — sent to LLM
Contextual enrichment — Anthropic technique. LLM adds a 1-2 sentence summary to each child chunk before embedding.
Embedding has no idea this is about
a DB connection pool in auth service
Phase 2 — retrieval (runs on every user query)
Cuts search space before any vector math
Merges BM25 + vector rankings intelligently → best 30 candidates
Cross-encoder reads each chunk + query together
Child chunk found → fetch full parent text → LLM gets rich context
Context builder assembles 7-slot prompt → Groq LLM generates answer → Redis caches result
